name: Bulrush Golf Club
about: Bulrush Golf Club offers a dual experience of traditional golf and indoor simulator play. The venue features a full 18-hole golf course and a dedicated Simulator Golf Lounge, allowing for year-round golf regardless of weather. The club provides a comfortable atmosphere at Rush Hour Bar & Grill, with additional offerings including leagues, lessons, and group events. It caters to both serious golfers and casual players seeking a social environment to enjoy the game.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor simulators provide golf access during winter months
Wide range of amenities including full bar and grill food service
Mobile app allows for easy booking and reservation management

food_and_drink.notes: Available at Rush Hour Bar & Grill with kitchen hours 11AM – 9PM everyday
Full bar service available at Rush Hour Bar & Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor providing detailed ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players should bring their own golf clubs to use in the simulators. The venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed. Rush Hour Bar & Grill is available with full kitchen and bar service during operating hours.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole rounds typically take about 1-2 hours to complete in the simulator bays depending on pace of play and number of players per bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bulrush Golf Club is family-friendly and welcomes junior golfers. The venue offers a welcoming atmosphere suitable for families and children.
